nav.aboutDesc: iDAELİK is a modern appointment and business management platform designed to help small and medium-sized businesses build their digital presence and manage bookings effortlessly.

landing.title: Smart Appointment Booking for Modern Businesses
landing.subtitle: iDAELİK allows you to create your own booking page, accept appointments online or in cash, and manage your schedule easily.
landing.aboutP1: At iDAELİK, our mission is to seamlessly connect wellness and professional service practitioners with their clients. We understand the unique challenges professionals face in managing their schedules while ensuring a top-tier customer experience.
landing.aboutP2: Built with simplicity and elegance in mind, our platform eliminates the friction of traditional booking systems. We empower you with dynamic mobile-first scheduling, secure authentication, and instant notifications, allowing you to focus on what you do best: providing exceptional service.
landing.contactSubtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.
landing.messageSentDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you shortly.
landing.messageError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
landing.termsIntro: Welcome to iDAELİK. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully.
landing.termsS1P1: 1.1. iDAELİK operates as a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform providing scheduling and booking solutions for independent professionals and their clients.
landing.termsS1P2: 1.2. By registering an account or making a booking, you confirm that you are at least 18 years of age and capable of entering into a legally binding agreement.
landing.termsS2P1: Professionals utilizing our platform to offer services must ensure that all service details, availability, and pricing are accurate and up-to-date.
landing.termsS2P2: iDAELİK provides the scheduling software but is not a party to the service agreement between the practitioner and the client. The practitioner holds sole responsibility for the quality, safety, and delivery of their services.
landing.termsS2P3: You are responsible for safeguarding your login credentials. Any activity occurring under your account is your responsibility.
landing.termsS3P1: Clients must provide a valid email address and phone number for SMS authentication and notifications to finalize a booking.
landing.termsS3P2: Practitioners reserve the right to accept, decline, or reschedule any pending booking request based on their professional discretion and availability.
landing.termsS3P3: Clients must communicate cancellations directly with the respective practitioner within the timeframe established by that practitioner's individual policies.
landing.termsS4P1: 4.1. You agree not to misuse the iDAELİK platform. This includes, but is not limited to: submitting false information, attempting to breach security measures (e.g., OTP bypassing), engaging in fraudulent bookings, or using the platform to transmit malicious code.
landing.termsS4P2: 4.2. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate our acceptable use policy without prior notice.
landing.termsS5P1: 5.1. iDAELİK is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure.
landing.termsS5P2: 5.2. In no event shall iDAELİK, its directors, employees, or partners be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the platform, including lost profits or loss of data.
landing.termsS6P1: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be communicated via email or platform notification. Continued use of the platform following modifications constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms and Conditions.
landing.privacyIntro: At iDAELİK, safeguarding your privacy and protecting your personal data is our highest priority. This comprehensive Privacy Policy outlines our practices regarding the collection, use, processing, and disclosure of your information when you access or use our platform.
landing.privacyS1P1: When a practitioner registers on iDAELİK, we collect their business name, full name, email address, phone number, and professional details (services, pricing, schedules).
landing.privacyS1P2: When a client creates a booking, we collect their full name, email address, phone number, and any optional notes. This is necessary to confirm the appointment.
landing.privacyS1P3: We utilize Firebase Phone Authentication. Consequently, phone numbers and verification codes (OTPs) are securely processed to verify user identity and prevent fraud.
landing.privacyS2P1: We use the collected information strictly for the following purposes:
landing.privacyS2L1: To facilitate and manage scheduling and bookings between clients and practitioners.
landing.privacyS2L2: To deliver critical transactional communications, such as booking confirmations, cancellations, and OTP authentication SMS messages.
landing.privacyS2L3: To provide customer support and respond to inquiries.
landing.privacyS2L4: To maintain the security and integrity of our platform and prevent unauthorized access.
landing.privacyS3P1: Client contact information and booking details are shared exclusively with the specific practitioner the client has booked with, to enable service delivery.
landing.privacyS3P2: We employ trusted third-party providers for hosting (Render, Aiven MySQL) and authentication/SMS services (Firebase, Twilio). These providers are bound by strict data processing agreements and are only permitted to use your data as necessary to provide these services to iDAELİK.
landing.privacyS3P3: We may disclose your information if required to do so by law, court order, or governmental request.
landing.privacyS3Note: iDAELİK strictly does not sell, rent, or trade your personal data to marketing agencies or any external third parties.
landing.privacyS4P1: We implement rigorous technical and organizational measures to protect your data. This includes secure HTTPS encryption, password hashing, and restricted database access.
landing.privacyS4P2: We retain your personal data only for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services, comply with our legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements.
landing.privacyS5P1: Depending on your location, you have the right to:
landing.privacyS5L1: Access the personal data we hold about you.
landing.privacyS5L2: Request corrections to inaccurate or incomplete data.
landing.privacyS5L3: Request the deletion of your account and associated data ("Right to be Forgotten").
landing.privacyS5Footer: To exercise these rights, practitioners may use their dashboard settings, and clients may contact us at privacy@idealik.com.

customer.bioFull: We provide personalized health assessments and comprehensive medical plans to optimize your well-being, both in-clinic and via secure tele-health.
